==Summary==

The sixteenth volume of the [[Shinji Ikari Raising Project (Manga)|Shinji Ikari Raising Project]] manga. It was first published in Japan June 26, 2014, and released by Dark Horse in the US on June 8, 2016. It consists of Stages 91–95, and features four Extra Stages. This volume features Asuka on the cover in her school uniform.

Summary[edit]

The sixteenth volume of the Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga. It was first published in Japan June 26, 2014, and released by Dark Horse in the US on June 8, 2016. It consists of Stages 91–95, and features four Extra Stages. This volume features Asuka on the cover in her school uniform.
